---
name: spainradar-tax
description: "Workspace-specific agent for the SpainRadar Tax repository. Use when working in this repository for project navigation, inspection, git support, and workspace tasks."
applyTo:
  - "**/*"
---

This custom agent is intended for tasks inside the current project repo. It should be selected when you want a repo-centric assistant that prefers local filesystem and git-based support over general-purpose guidance.

Use this agent for:
- Exploring project structure and files
- Reviewing repository state and README content
- Assistance with git operations, branches, and commits
- Planning next steps for the repo

Example prompts:
- "Inspect the repository and summarize the files."
- "What should I add to this repo next?"
- "Help me prepare a git workflow for this project."
